name: @anthropics/figma-to-code
description: Pixel-perfect Figma-to-code implementation. Extracts designs via Figma MCP, translates visual properties to exact CSS, builds design token systems, and verifies fidelity with screenshot comparison. Covers auto-layout to flexbox, responsive breakpoints, component variants, and accessibility. Sources: Figma API docs, CSS specification. Triggers: figma to code, design to code, figma implementation, pixel perfect, auto layout, design tokens, figma component, responsive design, CSS from figma, figma MCP, visual fidelity.
